ddt:Target.Name: N_P33A_EPS_UDS_PT_20201022
ddt:Target.Description:
[9]Oct 22nd, 2020 Nissan XX6 Implemented DiagVersion from communication spec.
[8]Sep 3rd, 2019 Nissan XX6 Added Item: Failures, FFD.
[7]Jun 26th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Modified Item: CF.
[6]Jun 14th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Modified Item: CF.
[5]May 29th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Added & Modified Item: CF.
[4]Mar 15th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Modified & Added item: Failures.
[3]Mar 14th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Modified item: Failures(OBD).
[2]Mar 12th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Added & Modified item : Failures.
[1]Dec 20th, 2018 Nissan XX6 Added item: DM, CF
[N]Jul 29th, 2018 Nissan XX6 Intial Creation based on N_L21B_EPS_UDS_sharp2_20171031.xml.

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
[C163D](TBD)Missing or Unreliable control requests for APA (ADAS failure)
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: disabled (default) => EPS will ignore HFP request(00h)
enabled => EPS able to receive HFP request from HFP(01h)
enabled => EPS able to receive HFP request from IPA(02h)

Data.Name: DataRead_$0179_#004_bit0_(TBD)Not a trivial name to be found
DataRead_$01EC_#004_bit0_(TBD)Absolute Steering Angle Sensor Calibaration Activation

DataItem.Name: DataRead_$0179_#004_bit0_(TBD)Not a trivial name to be found
DataRead_$01EC_#004_bit0_(TBD)Absolute Steering Angle Sensor Calibaration Activation

Device.Name: [C163D](TBD)Missing or Unreliable control requests for APA (ADAS failure)
